<!-- Source: https://www.chebfun.org/examples/fun/Encryption.html -->

<div class="chebfun-import chebfun-example-import">
<div class='page-header'>
<h1>Encryption of a message with <code>scribble</code></h1>
<h2>Nick Trefethen, April 2012 in <a href='../'>fun</a><span><a href='/examples/fun/Encryption.m'>download</a><span class='sep-sm'>&middot;</span><a href='//github.com/chebfun/examples/blob/master/fun/Encryption.m'>view on GitHub</a></span></h2>
</div>

<div id='content' class="col-sm-12 example" role="main">
<p>The <code>scribble</code> command produces piecewise linear complex chebfuns whose plots look like words, like this:</p>
<pre class="mcode-input">message = scribble('This is the message');
LW = 'linewidth'; lw = 2;
plot(message, LW, lw), axis equal</pre>

<p><img src="../../../images/fun/Encryption_01.png" class="figure chebfun-figure" alt=""></p>
<p>Here's another string:</p>
<pre class="mcode-input">key = scribble('Aardvarks eat ants');
plot(key, 'r', LW, lw), axis equal</pre>

<p><img src="../../../images/fun/Encryption_02.png" class="figure chebfun-figure" alt=""></p>
<p>Now if we plot the sum of the two, we get nonsense:</p>
<pre class="mcode-input">encrypted = message + key;
plot(encrypted, 'm', LW, lw), axis equal</pre>

<p><img src="../../../images/fun/Encryption_03.png" class="figure chebfun-figure" alt=""></p>
<p>So we've invented a new encryption scheme! For of course the original message can be recovered by subtracting off that key:</p>
<pre class="mcode-input">message2 = encrypted - key;
plot(message2, LW, lw), axis equal</pre>

<p><img src="../../../images/fun/Encryption_04.png" class="figure chebfun-figure" alt=""></p>
<p>So long as we're investigating the world's most expensive and least secure method of encryption, we might as well tangle up the text in the complex plane a bit too.  I'll bet you can't read this:</p>
<pre class="mcode-input">scrambled = exp(1.5i*(encrypted));
plot(scrambled, 'g', LW, lw), axis equal</pre>

<p><img src="../../../images/fun/Encryption_05.png" class="figure chebfun-figure" alt=""></p>
<p>But we can get the message back with a little unscramble:</p>
<pre class="mcode-input">message3 = unwrap(log(scrambled))/1.5i - 1 - key;
plot(message3, LW, lw), axis equal</pre>

<p><img src="../../../images/fun/Encryption_06.png" class="figure chebfun-figure" alt=""></p></div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
